name: OpenClaw Agent
description: Invoke Cursor Agent, Claude Code, or Codex CLI for deep code analysis, troubleshooting, and modification — directly from Feishu.

projects.description: Project name to local path mapping, e.g. { "myapp": "/Users/me/code/myapp" }

defaultTimeoutSec.description: Default execution timeout in seconds, default 600

noOutputTimeoutSec.description: No-output timeout in seconds; process is considered hung if no output for this duration, default 120

defaultEngine.description: Default CLI engine for the code_agent tool. If not set, prefers cursor when available

enableAgentTool.description: Whether to register code_agent tool for AI auto-invocation, default true

agentPath.description: Full path to the agent command. Leave empty for auto-detection

agentNodeBin.description: Direct path to Node.js bundled with Cursor Agent. Use with agentEntryScript to bypass shell script resolution

agentEntryScript.description: Direct path to Agent index.js entry script. Use with agentNodeBin

model.description: Model override for Cursor Agent, e.g. claude-4-sonnet. Leave empty for default

enableMcp.description: Whether to enable MCP servers (--approve-mcps), default true

prefixArgs.description: Extra args to inject before standard args (for testing)

claudePath.description: Full path to the claude command. Leave empty for auto-detection

model.description: Model override for Claude Code, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6. Leave empty for default

anthropicBaseUrl.description: Anthropic API proxy URL. Used when Gateway runs as LaunchAgent without shell env vars

anthropicAuthToken.description: Anthropic API auth token for proxy mode

codexPath.description: Full path to the codex command. Leave empty for auto-detection

model.description: Model override for Codex, e.g. gpt-5-codex. Leave empty for default

openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key for Codex. Used when Gateway runs as LaunchAgent without shell env vars

projects.label: Project Mapping
projects.help: Map short project names to local paths, e.g. { "myapp": "/Users/me/code/myapp" }

maxConcurrent.label: Max Concurrent
maxConcurrent.help: Maximum concurrent CLI processes across Cursor, Claude and Codex

claude.label: Claude Code Config
claude.help: Configuration for the /claude command. Authentication is automatic: proxy mode if ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL + ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN are set, otherwise uses claude login credentials

codex.label: Codex Config
codex.help: Configuration for the /codex command. Authentication via CODEX_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY env var or codex login
